title: chassalia angustifolia
intro: Chassalia angustifolia, also known as the Thai mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chassalia angustifolia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and cold, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Chassalia angustifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
